name: Meltaway Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and confectioners sugar until smooth.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Gradually mix in the cake flour and salt until well combined.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 8 minutes or until lightly golden.
7. Remove from oven and immediately dip each cookie into confectioners sugar while still warm.
